ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "work_year" INTEGER /* Year the job was posted */,
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experience level of the job */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment type of the job */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the job in the specified currency */,
  "salary_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the salary */,
  "salary_in_usd" REAL /* Salary of the job in USD */,
  "employee_residence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's residence */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Ratio of remote work for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "nice_to_have_skills" TEXT /* Nice to have skills for the job */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the job */,
  "functional_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the functional area of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_salary_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_employee_residence_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_residence_id") REFERENCES employee_residences ("employee_residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_experience_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level_id") REFERENCES experience_levels ("experience_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_functional_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("functional_area_id") REFERENCES functional_areas ("functional_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Name of the experience level (e.g., EN, SE, EX) */,
  "min_experience_years" INTEGER /* Minimum experience years required for this level */,
  "max_experience_years" INTEGER /* Maximum experience years required for this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., FT, PT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Name of the job title (e.g., Data Science Consultant, Data Scientist) */,
  "job_title_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_job_title_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_category_id") REFERENCES job_title_categories ("job_title_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_title_categories" (
  "job_title_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title category */,
  "job_title_category" TEXT /* Name of the job title category (e.g., Data Science, Engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "exchange_rate_to_usd" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_residences" (
  "employee_residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee residence */,
  "employee_residence" TEXT /* Name of the employee residence (e.g., DE, GR) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_residence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company size */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_size_id") REFERENCES company_sizes ("company_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sizes" (
  "company_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company size */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Name of the company size (e.g., L, M, S) */,
  "min_employees" INTEGER /* Minimum number of employees for this size */,
  "max_employees" INTEGER /* Maximum number of employees for this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_locations" (
  "company_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company location */,
  "company_location" TEXT /* Name of the company location (e.g., DE, US) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Finance, Healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_areas" (
  "functional_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional area */,
  "functional_area" TEXT /* Name of the functional area (e.g., Data Science, Engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_companies" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_locations" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "company_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id", "company_location_id")
)
